name: rootloom
description: An inspectable personal engineering workflow for Codex: scoped, risk-aware, and evidence-honest.

interface.shortDescription: Inspectable Codex engineering, woven from the roots up.
interface.longDescription: Rootloom gives individual developers a small Change, Review, and Guidance core. Low-confirmation Autonomy and bounded Evidence are optional; Project Memory is experimental. Installation stays lightweight, SessionStart context is read-only, and deep review remains explicit and separate from archived approval or audit machinery.
defaultPrompt: Classify and execute a task with the right Rootloom workflow tier.
Inspect project context, and persist AGENTS.md guidance only when explicitly requested.
Run an opt-in deep engineering review with a compact evidence summary.
